page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2a-c1m1.large is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an AMD EPYC processor running at a clock speed of 2.25 GHz. The instance is configured with 2 dedicated physical cores and 2 vCPUs, operating with a single thread per core. It is equipped with 2.0 GB of system memory, yielding a 1.0 GB memory-per-core ratio.

This instance does not include local NVMe or SSD storage, requiring network-attached storage for boot and data volumes. Network connectivity is provisioned with a baseline bandwidth of 1 Gbps, and it does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Given its dedicated CPU allocation paired with a minimal 2.0 GB memory footprint, this instance offers a highly specialized, entry-level compute-to-memory ratio. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for lightweight utility tasks, basic microservices, or small-scale compute-bound workloads that do not require large memory allocations or local storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2a-c1m1.large is an entry-level, x86_64 architecture virtual server powered by an AMD EPYC processor running at 2.25 GHz. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, the instance provides 2 dedicated physical cores and 2 vCPUs with a single thread per core. It features 2.0 GB of system memory, resulting in a 1:1 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. This instance does not include local storage, relying entirely on external block storage, and offers a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps. With its dedicated CPU allocation and low memory footprint, this server is designed for lightweight, compute-oriented workloads, basic microservices, and utility tasks that require dedicated processing power without the overhead of large memory capacities.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2a-c1m1.large is a KVM-based virtual server featuring 2 vCPUs, 2.0 GB of RAM, and an AMD EPYC processor at 2.25 GHz, designed for lightweight compute tasks without local storage.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2a-c1m1.large is a KVM virtual server with 2 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 2.0 GB RAM, and 1 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.
tagline: An entry-level dedicated compute instance featuring AMD EPYC processors and a compact memory footprint for lightweight utility workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by an AMD EPYC processor running at 2.25 GHz
Configured with 2 dedicated vCPUs and 2.0 GB of system memory
Features a 1 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Requires external network-attached storage as no local storage is bundled
Suited for lightweight microservices, utility scripts, and basic compute tasks
